Error pattern: "## RUNTIME ENVIRONMENT
- **Operating System:** Windows
- **Home directory:** `C:" → Fix: edit_file on docker-compose.prod.yml: replaced "  amavis:
    image: mvault/amavis:lates"
Workspace conventions: test-framework: jest, linter: eslint, build-cmd: npm run build:server && npm run build:web, dev-cmd: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web", main-branch: main
